'''Bron Burs''' was a member of a [[Species/Legends|species]] with horny spines on the back of its face and two pointed protrusions surrounding a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]]. Hailing from the southern part of<ref name="Bron Burs" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> [[Nentan]], he served as a [[Commando/Legends|commando]]<ref name="Bron Burs" /> for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]<ref name="CSWE" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] before eventually leaving the profession. Burs was a crack shot who liked to be on his own and an on-and-off partner of [[Debnoli]],<ref name="Bron Burs" /> an expert [[Sniper/Legends|marksman]].<ref name="Debnoli card">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Debnoli}}</ref> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] Bron Burs left the commando profession, he was covered with ugly scars. He relied on his intuition to survive. Burs also possessed a degree of [[Force-attunement]]. He had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and green skin.<ref name="Bron Burs" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bron Burs's origins date back to the production stages of the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. A number of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] maquettes were designed for the sequences in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|desert palace]]. Among those scrapped before the film's release was a maquette described as "a possible [[Wikipedia:Rhinoceros|rhino]]/[[Wikipedia:Elephant|elephant]] head."<ref name="SWC 242">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref> In [[1998]], the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]{{'s}} ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set released a [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/SpecialEdition-Light/large/bronburs.gif card] that named the alien as Bron Burs, thus bringing the maquette into [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[canon]].<ref name="Bron Burs" />
